Sunday Pancakes

Yield: 12 pancakes · Prep: 5 min · Cook: 15 min

What You'll Need

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 tbsp sugar
  • 2 tsp baking powder
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1 1/2 cups milk
  • 2 eggs
  • 3 tbsp melted butter

Method

  1. Whisk dry ingredients together.
  2. Whisk in milk, eggs, and butter.
  3. Cook on a griddle until bubbles form, flip, cook through.
